sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC, str_value VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value, str_value) VALUES (1, 8, '8'), (2, NULL, 'NULL'), (3, 27, '27'), (4, -1, '-1'), (5, 0, '0'), (6, 125, '125');
SELECT cbrt(n.value) << 2 AS transformed_value FROM test_numbers n WHERE n.value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT n.id, cbrt(n.value) AS cube_root, (cbrt(n.value) << 1) AS shifted_value FROM test_numbers n WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_numbers n2 WHERE n.value = n2.value AND n2.id < n.id) ORDER BY shifted_value DESC;
WITH cube_values AS (SELECT id, cbrt(value) AS cube_root FROM test_numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT cv.id, cv.cube_root << 2 AS shifted FROM cube_values cv ORDER BY shifted DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT n.id, cbrt(n.value) AS cube_root, n.str_value << 3 AS string_shifted FROM test_numbers n WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY n.id, n.str_value) AS grouped;
SELECT n.id, n.value, (cbrt(n.value) << 4) AS shifted_value FROM test_numbers n JOIN test_numbers n2 ON n.value = n2.value WHERE n.id != n2.id;
SELECT id, value, cbrt(value) AS cube_root FROM test_numbers WHERE value < (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_numbers) + (1 << 0) AND value IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_numbers (id, value, str_value) VALUES (7, -8, '-8'), (8, 64, '64');
SELECT n.id, cbrt(n.value) << 2 AS bitwise_shifted FROM test_numbers n WHERE n.value IS NOT NULL HAVING bitwise_shifted > 1;
